channel.title: Colab on Ronak Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Colab on Ronak Portfolio

item.title: Kaggle Connectivity to Colab
item.description: In this article I will show steps to load kaggle dataset directly to google colab. Prerequisite: Colab Kaggle Dataset Step 1 Select the dataset to load into colab. Step 2: You need authentication from kaggle services to download dataset. Now, you need to download API token. This token can be easily generated from the profile section of your Kaggle account. Simply, navigate to your Kaggle profile and then select account –> find API section –> create new API token
